features: 【Rechargeable Wireless Mouse】The wireless ergonomic mouse has a built-in 600mAh lithium battery that can be easily recharged by the supplied Type-C cable. It lasts for 60 days of use and 90 days standby on a full charge. Additionally, the ergonomic mice enter power-saving mode (completely cutting off power) after being idle for about 8 minutes; you can wake it by pressing the right or left button. The ON/OFF switch and intelligent sleep mode also help to save energy. No need to charge the Rechargeable mouse frequently.

【Fast Switching Between Three Devices】The Bluetooth mice feature Bluetooth 5.0, 3.0 and USB-A receiver modes for connectivity. When connected via Bluetooth (Bluetooth mode supports simultaneous connections to two devices), the vertical mice effectively reduce need for a USB-A port, making it ideal for devices without USB ports. Simply press the button on the back to easily switch between the two modes.(Note: The 2.4GHz receiver is built into the bottom of the mouse).

【Right Handed Ergonomic Design】The Right handed wireless mouse features a vertical ergonomic design with a 52° tilt angle. It positions your palm near-vertically, unlike traditional mice; it keeps your wrist joint natural and relaxed, minimizing fatigue and discomfort from prolonged use. This design offers ultimate comfort, a more enjoyable and longer-lasting office experience. (Note: Mouse is designed for right-handed use only).

【Higher DPI & 6 Adjustable Levels】This vertical ergonomic mouse is equipped with a high-performance chip and features 6 adjustable DPI levels (4800/3200/2400/1600/1200/800) to meet your daily needs. When changing the DPI, the light will flash, with the number of flashes corresponding to the DPI level.

【Silent Mouse】The vertical mouse provides nearly silent clicks, helping avoid disturbances to others and ensuring your work or study remains undisturbed (Note: Only the left and right click buttons of the mouse are silent; other function buttons are not silent). The side buttons make browsing the web a breeze by allowing you to easily turn pages. (Note: The side buttons are not programmable, side buttons are invalid in macOS)
【36-Month Warranty】If you encounter any problems in using the product, please feel free to contact our professional customer service team and enjoy TECKNET 36-month warranty (registration required).
